title: Structured Observability, Health, Profiling, Capacity, and Incidents · Failure Repair Bay
summary: An incident responder inherits a plausible but defective low-cardinality service evidence and incident dashboard; retain the failing request and response, isolate the first causal server boundary, and keep a regression probe. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in low-cardinality service evidence and incident dashboard and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and…
objectives: Emit one structured request completion record with request and trace IDs, method, route pattern, status, duration, bytes, trusted peer class, and redaction.

Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
